```{r Create header as definition list or as as comparative table depending on reference data availability}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

# Check if reference data is available
has_reference <- "ref" %in% benchmark_data$dataset_names

if (!has_reference) {
  cat(sep = "\n", c(
    paste0(sR$headerList$createdAt,":"),
    "",
    paste0(":   ",dR$own$creationTimestamp),
    "",
    paste0(sR$headerList$dataUpTo,":"),
    "",
    paste0(":   ",dR$own$dataUpToTimestamp),
    "",
    paste0(sR$headerList$effectiveAnalysisPeriod,":"),
    "",
    paste0(":   ",dR$own$effectiveAnalysisPeriod, "^[", sR$headerList$effectiveAnalysisPeriodFootnote, "]"),
    "",
    paste0(if(length(benchmark_data$metadata$own$countries) > 1)sR$headerList$countries else sR$headerList$country, ":"),
    "",
    paste0(":   ",dR$own$countriesList),
    "",
    paste0(sR$headerList$birthweightFilter,":"),
    "",
    paste0(":   ",dR$own$birthweightFilter),
    "",
    paste0(sR$headerList$gestationalAgeFilter,":"),
    "",
    paste0(":   ",dR$own$gestationalAgeFilter)
  ))
} else {
  metadata_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
    parameter = c(
      sR$headerList$createdAt,
      sR$headerList$dataUpTo,
      sR$headerList$effectiveAnalysisPeriod,
      if(length(benchmark_data$metadata$own$countries) > 1) {
        sR$headerList$countries
      } else {
        sR$headerList$country
      },
      sR$headerList$birthweightFilter,
      sR$headerList$gestationalAgeFilter
    ),
    own_value = c(
      dR$own$creationTimestamp,
      dR$own$dataUpToTimestamp,
      dR$own$effectiveAnalysisPeriod,
      dR$own$countriesList,
      dR$own$birthweightFilter,
      dR$own$gestationalAgeFilter
    ),
    ref_value = c(
      dR$ref$creationTimestamp,
      dR$ref$dataUpToTimestamp,
      dR$ref$effectiveAnalysisPeriod,
      dR$ref$countriesList,
      dR$ref$birthweightFilter,
      dR$ref$gestationalAgeFilter
    )
  )

  tbl <- metadata_tbl |>
    gt(rowname_col = "parameter") |>
    cols_label(
      own_value = sR$department_data,
      ref_value = sR$reference_data
    ) |>
    tab_options(
      table.width = pct(100),
      table.font.size = 13,
      footnotes.marks = "extended"
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = cells_column_labels()
    ) |>
    cols_width(
      stub() ~ pct(30),
      own_value ~ pct(35),
      ref_value ~ pct(35)
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sR$headerList$effectiveAnalysisPeriodFootnote,
      locations = cells_stub(rows = parameter == sR$headerList$effectiveAnalysisPeriod)
    )

  # Highlight rows with differences
  if (metadata_diff$birthweight_differs) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      tab_style(
        style = cell_fill(color = "#FFFACD"),
        locations = cells_body(
          columns = c(own_value, ref_value),
          rows = parameter == sR$headerList$birthweightFilter
        )
      ) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sR$headerList$filterDiffersFootnote,
        locations = cells_stub(rows = parameter == sR$headerList$birthweightFilter)
      )
  }

  if (metadata_diff$gestational_age_differs) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      tab_style(
        style = cell_fill(color = "#FFFACD"),
        locations = cells_body(
          columns = c(own_value, ref_value),
          rows = parameter == sR$headerList$gestationalAgeFilter
        )
      ) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sR$headerList$filterDiffersFootnote,
        locations = cells_stub(rows = parameter == sR$headerList$gestationalAgeFilter)
      )
  }

  if (metadata_diff$countries_differ) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      tab_style(
        style = cell_fill(color = "#FFFACD"),
        locations = cells_body(
          columns = c(own_value, ref_value),
          rows = parameter %in% c(sR$headerList$country, sR$headerList$countries)
        )
      )
  }

  tbl
}
```

```{r Show benchmark comparability callout}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr 'has_reference'

if (metadata_diff$countries_differ) {
  # Determine base message based on reference country count
  if(length(benchmark_data$metadata$ref$countries) > 1){
    base_message <- sR$headerList$multiCountryBenchmarkHint
  } else {
    base_message <- sR$headerList$singleCountryBenchmarkHint
  }

  # Add World Bank class mismatch addendum if applicable
  if (!is.null(wb_class_mismatch) && wb_class_mismatch$has_mismatch) {
    full_message <- paste0(
      base_message,
      " ",
      sprintf(
        sR$headerList$wbClassMismatchAddendum,
        sR$headerList$ownDataLabel,
        wb_class_mismatch$own_classes,
        sR$headerList$refDataLabel,
        wb_class_mismatch$ref_classes
      )
    )
  } else {
    full_message <- base_message
  }

  cat(sep = "\n", c(
    "::: {.callout-tip}",
    paste0("## ", sR$headerList$benchmarkComparabilityHeader),
    "",
    full_message,
    ":::"
  ))
}
```

```{r Show special analysis hint if test data or ineligible patients included}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

if (
  benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$include_test_data ||
  benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$include_ineligible_patients) {
  cat(sep = "\n", c("::: {.callout-note}", paste0(
    c(
    sR$headerList$specialAnalysisHint,
    if(benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$include_test_data){
      paste0(sR$headerList$includesTestDepartments,
      if(benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$include_ineligible_patients)
        sR$headerList$and
      else
        ".", collapse = "")
    },
    if (benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$include_ineligible_patients)
      sR$headerList$ignoresInclusionCriteria
    ), collapse = " "),
    ":::"))
}
```
